response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His 10+ years of diverse engineering roles, open-source contributions, and process advocacy (TDD, CI/CD) exceed the 6-year requirement. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and basic German may hinder local collaboration.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS across multiple enterprise roles
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions, including MCP code generators
Strong DevOps and process discipline with Docker, GitLab CI, TDD, and trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent work history
Kotlin/Java experience is outdated (last seen in 2018) and not recent
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting local team integration
